question: Implement a multi-level inheritance hierarchy: `Person` (base) -> `Employee` (derived from Person) -> `Manager` (derived from Employee). Add relevant attributes and methods at each level.

test_cases.expected:
--- Creating Valid Objects ---
Person Info: Name: Alice, Age: 30
Employee Info: Name: Bob, Age: 35, Employee ID: 101, Salary: 60000
Employee Bonus (10%): 6000
Manager Info: Name: Charlie, Age: 45, Employee ID: 201, Salary: 90000, Department: Engineering, Direct Reports: 10
Manager Charlie is conducting a performance review for Dave in Engineering.

--- Demonstrating Polymorphism ---
Name: Eve, Age: 28
Name: Frank, Age: 32, Employee ID: 102, Salary: 55000
Name: Grace, Age: 50, Employee ID: 202, Salary: 120000, Department: HR, Direct Reports: 15

--- Attempting to Create Invalid Objects (expecting errors) ---
Error creating Person: Age must be between 0 and 150.
Error creating Employee: Salary cannot be negative.
Error creating Manager: Number of direct reports cannot be negative.
